title: iEEG_visual
description: This intracranial EEG dataset contains recordings from 2 subjects performing a visual task involving presentation of gratings and noise patterns. The dataset includes raw ECoG data, stimulus files, and metadata organized according to BIDS specification. The data were collected to investigate stimulus-dependent gamma oscillations in human visual cortex and the relationship between neuronal synchrony and hemodynamic responses.
methods_description: Subjects performed a visual fixation task while viewing images spanning approximately 25×25 degrees of visual angle. Stimuli included high-contrast vertical gratings (0.16, 0.33, 0.65, or 1.3 duty cycles per degree square wave) and noise patterns with varying spectral power distributions (k/f^4, k/f^2, k/f^0). A central fixation dot alternated between red and green at random intervals. Subject 1 performed button presses upon color changes; Subject 2 maintained fixation without manual responses. ECoG data were recorded using the Brainvision data format.
